input.task: Generate deterministic Auth + Onboarding implementation task tree from approved canonical decision package
scope: Baseline under backend/supabase/baseline_slots is the physical target state
Repository code is legacy reference only
Deferred binary avatar/media work is excluded
Task tree begins after contract decisions are materialized

task_tree.description: Add append-only baseline slot 0023 for canonical auth runtime substrate by creating app.refresh_tokens and app.auth_events exactly as required by the baseline contract.
Add append-only baseline slot 0024 for operator-controlled first-admin bootstrap by creating app.admin_bootstrap_state and app.bootstrap_first_admin(target_user_id uuid).
Align bootstrap function execution permissions with the operator/service_role access model by granting service_role execution while preserving operator-only authority and no public runtime route.

Align backend auth persistence to the baseline-owned auth substrate only, including refresh-token persistence, auth-event writes, operator bootstrap boundary, and removal of runtime schema introspection from auth/profile repositories.

Implement the canonical onboarding-completion surface POST /auth/onboarding/complete as the only incomplete-to-completed transition path, with explicit action semantics and token_refresh_required=true success response.

Replace teacher-request authority with canonical admin grant/revoke teacher-role routes that mutate app.auth_subjects.role_v2 plus role mirror only, write auth events, and revoke target refresh tokens.

Align profile projection surfaces so PATCH /profiles/me writes only display_name and bio, photo_url remains read composition only, avatar_media_id remains persisted projection only, and no auth/onboarding surface owns avatar upload behavior.
Separate referral from auth execution by removing referral_code acceptance and auth-side redemption or membership-grant behavior from register and adjacent auth persistence paths.
Apply the canonical Auth + Onboarding failure contract and Swedish user-facing message policy to all kept backend surfaces, removing detail/error ambiguity on owned routes only.

Align frontend auth and onboarding flows to canonical routes, canonical profile projection, referral separation, token refresh consequences, admin teacher grant/revoke routes, and the canonical failure envelope.

Remove forbidden legacy Auth + Onboarding surfaces and hidden authority sources after canonical replacements exist, including teacher-request flows, certificate/approval authority, avatar write surfaces, change-password route, legacy onboarding states, and auth referral coupling.

Rewrite tests and verification scripts so they assert only canonical Auth + Onboarding truth, canonical baseline objects, canonical failure payloads, and the elimination of teacher-request and avatar-write authority.
Run the aggregate contract-surface gate for route inventory, baseline object inventory, failure-envelope shape, referral separation, and the absence of forbidden legacy authority.
